_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the start-transaction-failures playbook (Branch 2: transaction scope skips its body on the defective UiPath.Database.Activities v1.5.0 build — the Start Transaction scope enters and exits cleanly with NO error, but every child activity is skipped, so nothing is read or written and the job reports Success having done nothing). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key c4a7e2f9-1b3d-4e5a-8c6f-9d0e1f2a3b4c --state Faulted --output json
or jobs list --folder-key c4a7e2f9-1b3d-4e5a-8c6f-9d0e1f2a3b4c --state Successful --output json
or jobs logs d5b8f3a0-2c4e-4f6b-9d7a-0e1f2a3b4c5d --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
